data.content: Implementation review rejected. Findings: (1) required Playwright acceptance coverage is not passing: bunx playwright test tests/e2e/beat-refresh-latency.spec.ts fails 3/3 by timing out on page.waitForLoadState('networkidle') before any latency assertion, and the spec targets nonexistent selectors [data-testid='beat-row'] / [data-testid='beat-priority']; (2) non-user background events still trigger immediate beat-list refresh via src/lib/session-connection-manager.ts -> invalidateBeatListQueries(), which uses refetchType='active', so acceptance criterion 3 is still violated. Sanity checks passing on branch: bun run lint (targeted), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
